abilities.name: Demise (Flashover)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, models within (r)1" gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Sputtering Exhaust
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is concealing terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

actions.name: "Up We Go!"
actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Flaming Bottle
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or gain a Burning token. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Hop, Friends!
triggers.text: Each ally within (aura)2" of the target may gain either an Adaptable token or an Impact token.

triggers.name: Hop On
triggers.text: Choose an ally within 2". Place the chosen model in base contact with this model.
